assessment_objectives.objective: novel methods and technologies for the measurement of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT)-related risks are defined.
novel methods and technologies for the measurement of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT)-related risks to evaluate content provenance.
novel methods and technologies for the measurement of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT)-related risks to evaluate oﬀensive cyber capabilities.

novel methods and technologies for the measurement of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT)-related risks to evaluate Chemical, Biological, Radiological or Nuclear (CBRN) weapons.
novel methods and technologies for the measurement of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT)-related risks to evaluate other dangerous materials or agents.
